name: get_username
description: Intelligently determines the appropriate username or alias for Salesforce operations.

defaultTargetOrg.description: Resolve the default target org username

defaultDevHub.description: Resolve the default target devhub org username

directory.description: The directory to run this tool from (absolute path)

name: list_all_orgs
description: Lists all configured Salesforce orgs. Only use if the user explicitly asks for a list of orgs.

directory.description: The directory to run this tool from (absolute path)

name: run_soql_query
description: Run a SOQL query against a Salesforce org.

usernameOrAlias.description: The username or alias for the Salesforce org

directory.description: The directory to run this tool from (absolute path)

useToolingApi.description: Use Tooling API for the operation

name: deploy_metadata
description: Deploy metadata to an org from your local project.

ignoreConflicts.description: Ignore conflicts and deploy local files, even if they overwrite changes in the org.

sourceDir.description: Path to the local source files to deploy.

manifest.description: Full file path for manifest (XML file) of components to deploy.

apexTestLevel.description: Apex test level to use during deployment.

apexTests.description: Apex test classes to run during deployment.

usernameOrAlias.description: The username or alias for the Salesforce org

directory.description: The directory to run this tool from (absolute path)

name: retrieve_metadata
description: Retrieve metadata from an org to your local project.

ignoreConflicts.description: Ignore conflicts and save files to local filesystem.

sourceDir.description: Path to the local source files to retrieve.

manifest.description: Full file path for manifest (XML file) of components to retrieve.

usernameOrAlias.description: The username or alias for the Salesforce org

directory.description: The directory to run this tool from (absolute path)

name: run_apex_test
description: Run Apex tests in an org.

async.description: Whether to wait for tests to finish

suiteName.description: A suite of apex test classes to run

testRunId.description: ID of an in-progress or completed apex test run

verbose.description: Include more test information in context

usernameOrAlias.description: The username or alias for the Salesforce org

directory.description: The directory to run this tool from (absolute path)

name: run_agent_test
description: Run Agent tests in an org (aiEvaluationDefinition tests only, NOT Apex tests).

usernameOrAlias.description: The username or alias for the Salesforce org

directory.description: The directory to run this tool from (absolute path)

async.description: Whether to wait for tests to finish or return test id immediately

name: assign_permission_set
description: Assign a permission set to one or more org users.

permissionSetName.description: A single permission set to assign

usernameOrAlias.description: The username or alias for the Salesforce org

onBehalfOf.description: A username or alias to assign the permission set to on behalf of (only when explicitly requested)

directory.description: The directory to run this tool from (absolute path)

name: create_scratch_org
description: Creates a scratch org with the specified parameters.

directory.description: The directory to run this tool from (absolute path)

duration.description: Number of days before the org expires

definitionFile.description: Path to scratch definition JSON file

async.description: Return immediately with org ID (true) or wait for completion (false)

setDefault.description: Set newly created scratch org as default-target-org

snapshot.description: Snapshot name to use when creating a scratch org

sourceOrg.description: 15-character ID of the org shape to base the scratch org on

username.description: Username of the scratch org admin user

description.description: Description given to the scratch org

adminEmail.description: Email address for the org's admin user

name: delete_org
description: Deletes a specified Salesforce org. ALWAYS confirm with the user before deleting.

directory.description: The directory to run this tool from (absolute path)

usernameOrAlias.description: The username or alias of the org to delete

name: open_org
description: Open a Salesforce org in the browser. You can specify a metadata file you want to open.

filePath.description: File path of the metadata to open (must be an existing file path in the project)

usernameOrAlias.description: The username or alias for the Salesforce org

directory.description: The directory to run this tool from (absolute path)

name: resume_tool_operation
description: Resume a long running operation that was not completed by another tool.

jobId.description: The job id of the long running operation to resume

wait.description: Amount of time to wait for the operation to complete in minutes

usernameOrAlias.description: The username or alias for the Salesforce org

directory.description: The directory to run this tool from (absolute path)

name: create_org_snapshot
description: Creates a new snapshot of an org.

directory.description: The directory to run this tool from (absolute path)

sourceOrg.description: The org username or alias to create a snapshot of

name: list_devops_center_projects
description: List all DevOps Center projects in a specific org.

usernameOrAlias.description: Username or alias for the Salesforce org

name: list_devops_center_work_items
description: List all the work items for a specific DevOps Center project.

usernameOrAlias.description: Username or alias for the Salesforce org

name: create_devops_center_work_item
description: Creates a new DevOps Center Work Item in the specified project.

name: promote_devops_center_work_item
description: Promote an approved work item to the next stage in the DevOps Center pipeline.

workItemNames.description: Exact Work Item Names to promote

name: detect_devops_center_merge_conflict
description: Detects merge conflicts for a selected work item or in given source branch.

sourcebranch.description: Source branch of the Work Item

name: resolve_devops_center_merge_conflict
description: Resolves merge conflicts for a selected work item by name.

name: checkout_devops_center_work_item
description: Checks out the branch associated with a selected work item by name.

workItemName.description: Exact Work Item Name to check out

localPath.description: Directory path where the repository should be cloned/checked out

name: commit_devops_center_work_item
description: Commit SFDX project changes and register the commit SHA in DevOps Center.

workItemName.description: Exact Work Item Name to commit

repoPath.description: Absolute path to the git repository root

name: update_devops_center_work_item_status
description: Update the status of a DevOps Center work item to 'In Progress' or 'Ready to Promote'.

workItemName.description: Exact Work Item Name to update (e.g. WI-00000001)

name: check_devops_center_commit_status
description: Check the current status of a work item committed to DevOps Center.

requestId.description: Request ID from the commit operation to check status for

name: create_devops_center_pull_request
description: Commit local changes to a DevOps Center work item's feature branch and create a pull request.

workItemName.description: Exact Work Item Name to create pull request

name: run_code_analyzer
description: Performs static analysis against code. Validates best practices, security vulnerabilities, and performance issues. Returns JSON with path to results file.

target.description: Array of 1-10 ABSOLUTE file paths to scan

name: list_code_analyzer_rules
description: Select Code Analyzer rules based on criteria. Returns a JSON array of rules matching a colon-separated selector.

selector.description: A colon-separated selector for Code Analyzer rules (e.g. 'Security:pmd', 'Critical')

allowFullList.description: Opt-in to return the full list of rules. Defaults to false.

name: query_code_analyzer_results
description: Query a Code Analyzer results JSON file and return filtered violations. Use after run_code_analyzer.

resultsFile.description: Absolute path to a results JSON file produced by the code analyzer

topN.description: Return at most this many violations (default 25, max 1000)

allowLargeResultSet.description: Opt-in to request more than default top N violations

name: describe_code_analyzer_rule
description: Get the description of a Code Analyzer rule, including how it can be fixed.

engineName.description: The engine to which the rule belongs

name: get_ast_nodes_to_generate_xpath
description: First step for creating a PMD XPath-based custom rule. Generates an XPath expression from sample code that violates a pattern.

sampleCode.description: Sample code which violates the rule

language.description: Programming language of the sample code (e.g. 'apex', 'javascript', 'xml')

name: create_custom_rule
description: Create a custom rule using a provided XPath expression. Use after get_ast_nodes_to_generate_xpath.

xpath.description: XPath expression that matches the violation (required for PMD)

description.description: Short description or message for the rule

workingDirectory.description: Workspace directory where code-analyzer.yml will be created or updated

name: get_mobile_lwc_offline_analysis
description: Analyzes LWC components for mobile-specific issues and provides detailed recommendations for improvements. Checks if components are mobile-ready.

path.description: Path to component file relative to LWC bundle root

name: get_mobile_lwc_offline_guidance
description: Provides structured review instructions to detect and remediate Mobile Offline code violations in Lightning web components (LWCs) for Salesforce Mobile Apps.

name: create_mobile_lwc_app_review
description: Provides TypeScript-based API documentation for Salesforce LWC App Review Service, for implementing the App Review feature in an LWC.

name: create_mobile_lwc_ar_space_capture
description: Provides TypeScript-based API documentation for Salesforce LWC AR Space Capture, for implementing AR Space Capture in an LWC.

name: create_mobile_lwc_barcode_scanner
description: Provides TypeScript-based API documentation for Salesforce LWC Barcode Scanner, for implementing Barcode Scanner in an LWC.

name: create_mobile_lwc_biometrics
description: Provides TypeScript-based API documentation for Salesforce LWC Biometrics Service, for implementing the Biometrics feature in an LWC.

name: create_mobile_lwc_calendar
description: Provides TypeScript-based API documentation for Salesforce LWC Calendar Service, for implementing the Calendar feature in an LWC.

name: create_mobile_lwc_contacts
description: Provides TypeScript-based API documentation for Salesforce LWC Contacts Service, for implementing the Contacts feature in an LWC.

name: create_mobile_lwc_document_scanner
description: Provides TypeScript-based API documentation for Salesforce LWC Document Scanner, for implementing Document Scanner in an LWC.

name: create_mobile_lwc_geofencing
description: Provides TypeScript-based API documentation for Salesforce LWC Geofencing Service, for implementing Geofencing in an LWC.

name: create_mobile_lwc_location
description: Provides TypeScript-based API documentation for Salesforce LWC Location Service, for implementing Location Services in an LWC.

name: create_mobile_lwc_nfc
description: Provides TypeScript-based API documentation for Salesforce LWC NFC Service, for implementing NFC in an LWC.

name: create_mobile_lwc_payments
description: Provides TypeScript-based API documentation for Salesforce LWC Payments Service, for implementing Payments in an LWC.

name: salesforce_search_objects
description: Search for Salesforce standard and custom objects by name pattern. Examples: 'Account' finds Account, AccountHistory; 'Order' finds WorkOrder, ServiceOrder__c etc.

searchPattern.description: Search pattern to find objects (e.g. 'Account Coverage' finds 'AccountCoverage__c')

name: salesforce_describe_object
description: Get detailed schema metadata including all fields, relationships, and field properties of any Salesforce object. Examples: 'Account' shows all Account fields; 'Case' shows all Case fields including relationships.

name: salesforce_query_records
description: Query records from any Salesforce object using SOQL, including relationship queries (parent-to-child, child-to-parent, multi-level). For GROUP BY/aggregate queries use salesforce_aggregate_query.

objectName.description: API name of the object to query

fields.description: List of fields to retrieve, including relationship fields (dot notation and subqueries)

whereClause.description: WHERE clause (can include conditions on related objects)

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return

name: salesforce_dml_records
description: Perform data manipulation operations (insert, update, delete, upsert) on Salesforce records.

externalIdField.description: External ID field name for upsert operations

name: salesforce_execute_anonymous
description: Execute anonymous Apex code in Salesforce. Results include compilation success/failure, execution success/failure, and debug logs.

logLevel.description: Log level for debug logs (defaults to DEBUG)

name: salesforce_manage_debug_logs
description: Manage debug logs for Salesforce users — enable, disable, or retrieve logs.

logId.description: ID of a specific log to retrieve

name: salesforce_manage_field
description: Create new custom fields or modify existing fields on any Salesforce object. Supports all field types: Text, Number, Date, Lookup, Master-Detail, Picklist, etc.

fieldName.description: API name for the field (without __c suffix)

name: salesforce_manage_field_permissions
description: Manage Field Level Security (Field Permissions) for custom and standard fields. Grant/revoke read/edit access for specific profiles or permission sets.

name: salesforce_manage_object
description: Create new custom objects or modify existing ones in Salesforce. Supports create/update with field, relationship, and sharing model settings.

name: salesforce_read_apex
description: Read Apex classes from Salesforce. Supports reading by class name or listing by name pattern with wildcards (* and ?).

className.description: Name of a specific Apex class to read

namePattern.description: Pattern to match Apex class names (wildcards * and ?)

includeMetadata.description: Whether to include metadata (API version, length, last modified)

name: salesforce_read_apex_trigger
description: Read Apex triggers from Salesforce. Supports reading by trigger name or listing by name pattern with wildcards.

triggerName.description: Name of a specific Apex trigger to read

namePattern.description: Pattern to match trigger names (wildcards * and ?)

includeMetadata.description: Include metadata (API version, object type, last modified)

name: salesforce_search_all
description: Search across multiple Salesforce objects using SOSL (Salesforce Object Search Language). Supports wildcards, field-level filtering, and WITH clauses.

searchTerm.description: Text to search for (supports wildcards * and ?)

name: salesforce_write_apex
description: Create or update Apex classes in Salesforce. Class body must be valid Apex code.

className.description: Name of the Apex class to create or update

body.description: Full body of the Apex class

name: salesforce_write_apex_trigger
description: Create or update Apex triggers in Salesforce. Trigger body must be valid Apex trigger code.

objectName.description: Salesforce object the trigger is for (required for 'create')

body.description: Full body of the Apex trigger

name: salesforce_aggregate_query
description: Execute SOQL queries with GROUP BY, aggregate functions (COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX, COUNT_DISTINCT), and HAVING clauses. Use for queries that summarize and group data. For regular non-aggregate queries use salesforce_query_records.

objectName.description: API name of the object to query

selectFields.description: Fields to select — mix of group fields and aggregates. Format: 'FieldName' or 'COUNT(Id) AliasName'

groupByFields.description: Fields to group by — must include all non-aggregate fields from selectFields

whereClause.description: WHERE clause to filter rows BEFORE grouping

havingClause.description: HAVING clause to filter results AFTER grouping (for aggregate conditions)
